evals.prompt: hey can you check my pipeline? want to see who i need to follow up with today
evals.expected_output: A prioritized report showing all leads from HubSpot organized by urgency (overdue, due soon, on track), with specific SOP step recommendations for each

evals.prompt: morning check-in - what does my outreach look like this week?
evals.expected_output: Same pipeline scan but with a focus on the weekly cadence targets (10-15 connections, 3-5 DMs) and what's coming up in the next few days

evals.prompt: run the pipeline check. i feel like some leads have been sitting there for a while and i haven't touched them
evals.expected_output: Pipeline scan with emphasis on stale/unworked leads (NEW status, old createdate) and overdue follow-ups, organized by urgency with actionable next steps
